DataSource.SQL: UPDATE usr.ITSMRequest SET IsBreakdownDone = 1 WHERE ID = @ID
SELECT CAST([GUID] AS VARCHAR(MAX)) AS ITSMEntryMethodTypeGuid FROM usr.ITSMEntryMethodTypeSetting WHERE FunctionalKey = 'email' AND [State] != @DeletedState

Condition.SQL: DECLARE @LastTreeIdent VARCHAR(900) = (SELECT COALESCE(@ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident, @ITSMCompanyIdent)) SELECT IIF( ISNULL(IsBreakdownDone, 0) = 0 AND State = @SolutionAssignedToTeam AND EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMCategory AS cat INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTreeView AS folTre ON folTre.TableID = cat.ID AND folTre.FormIdent = @FormIdent WHERE folTre.Ident = @LastTreeIdent AND ISNULL(cat.IsBreakdown,0) = 1 AND cat.State != @DeletedState ) , 1, 0) FROM usr.ITSMRequest WHERE ID = @ID
